title: Clade Ib Mpox Outbreak 芒聙聰 Kenya, July 2024芒聙聯February 2025 | MMWR
text:
RE 2 . Number of confirmed clade Ib mpox cases, by county of report and proximity to the highway from Mombasa to Malaba — Kenya, July 2024–February 2025* 
* Number and percentage of cases, by county: Bungoma: three (6%); Busia: 12 (25.0%); Kajiado: two (4%); Kericho: two (4%); Kilifi: two (4%); Makueni: two (4%); Mombasa: nine (19%); Nairobi: three (6%); Nakuru: 10 (21%); Taita Taveta: two (4%); Uasin Gishu: one (2.1%).
